wordplay_note: The grinder — he grinds himself down to serve humanity
card_description: Gino Molinari (meaning "Molinari = miller (Italian)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Now Wait for Last Year*. Secretary General of Earth (The Mole) who sacrifices his health for political strategy. Name note: The grinder — he grinds himself down to serve humanity. The self-sacrificing leader who uses his own suffering as a political tool. First appears in *Now Wait for Last Year*.

reference.brief: Secretary General of Earth (The Mole) who sacrifices his health for political strategy
reference.significance: The self-sacrificing leader who uses his own suffering as a political tool
